probe_method: Dispatch simple prompt to each Tier 1 model using exact name from ollama list. Verify model_returned field matches requested model.

probes.response_preview: I am a large language model trained by Google.
probes.note: Name match correct. Self-identification wrong (says Google) but routing is correct — Ollama dispatched to Qwen model. Long elapsed due to cold load + thinking mode.

probes.response_preview: I'm an AI model known as Llama.

probes.note: GLM fails to load. Cannot verify routing. Same crash as R2.
Routing correct. Self-identification wrong (says AI-powered assistant) — known W0 identity confusion. Routing mechanism works.

evidence_summary: 3/4 models route correctly by exact name — model_returned matches model_requested for Qwen, Llama, Nemotron. No typo-sensitivity or silent wrong-model dispatch observed. GLM cannot load (500), so routing untestable. Routing mechanism itself is sound.
workaround: GLM routing failure is a load failure, not a routing failure. If GLM could load, routing would likely work. 3-model routing is fully functional.
shippability_impact: 3-model routing works. 4-model cascade requires GLM fix or alternative model.
